title: Verify notification delivery for 'Remind Me' functionality
description: Test that when a user opts for a reminder, a WhatsApp/Push notification is successfully delivered 24 hours before the trial's expiration time.
preconditions: User has an active trial with more than 24 hours remaining.
User has enabled the 'Remind me' toggle.
User has granted notification permissions and/or linked WhatsApp.

steps.description: 1. Set the trial to expire in 25 hours.
2. Enable the 'Remind me' toggle in the Trial Corner.
4. Check the user's device for a push notification or WhatsApp for a message.

expected_result: A notification with the correct copy ('...your trial is ending soon...') is received on the user's designated channel (Push/WhatsApp) approximately 24 hours before the trial is set to auto-renew.
